latest_iteration.title: From Mark To Motion
latest_iteration.lesson: start by translating one proven Kron artifact into a reusable video-template target before building a broader media system.
latest_iteration.intended_idea: The first Remotion experiment should not invent a new story; it should give timing and motion to the strongest current Kron artifact.

browser_preview.motion: slow push, drift toward the mark, final hold

latest_iteration.safety_state: No cron job was changed, no public post was made, and the Remotion render was embedded only in the Workshop.

lessons.lesson: start by translating one proven Kron artifact into a reusable video-template target before building a broader media system.
